title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Skill Brief: Trust Boundaries
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext trust boundaries increment in an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map permissions, data flow, instruction authority, and side effects at each boundary.
Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
